samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Grease and flour a 10 x 15-inch pan
Combine cake mix, milk, condensed milk, butter and eggs
Pour into prepared cake pan and bake 30 to 35 minutes
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- cake
- milk
- condensed milk
- butter
- eggs
- frosting

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Grease and flour a 10 x 15-inch pan
3. Combine cake mix, milk, condensed milk, butter and eggs
4. Pour into prepared cake pan and bake 30 to 35 minutes
5. Remove from oven and cool
6. Spread frosting on top
7. Keep refrigerated

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Add beaten eggs, one at a time
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- butter
- sugar
- vanilla
- eggs
- flour
- soda

Instructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add beaten eggs, one at a time
3. Blend in vanilla
4. Sift flour and soda together
5. Add alternately with buttermilk
6. Blend thoroughly
7. Bake at 350 for 45 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Mix together brown sugar, eggs, oil and vanilla
Drop from teaspoon onto cookie sheet
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- brown sugar
- sugar
- eggs
- oil
- vanilla
- flour
- oats
- salt
- soda
- chocolate chips

Instructions:
1. Mix together brown sugar, eggs, oil and vanilla
2. Combine dry ingredients
3. Add to creamed mixture
4. Stir in chips
5. Drop from teaspoon onto cookie sheet
6. Bake at 375 for 12 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Grease and flour a square baking pan
In a large bowl, combine oil, sugar, eggs and pumpkin
In another bowl, combine the flour, soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
Add to pumpkin mixture and beat well
Pour batter into the prepared baking pan. <NEXT_
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- cooking oil
- sugar
- eggs
- pumpkin
- flour
- soda
- salt
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- nuts

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Grease and flour a square baking pan
3. In a large bowl, combine oil, sugar, eggs and pumpkin
4. In another bowl, combine the flour, soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
5. Add to pumpkin mixture and beat well
6. Stir in nuts
7. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan. <NEXT_
